arts.ttl: 'Everyone is writing Man City off too soon - here's what I expect will happen next'
arts.sum: Manchester City's defeat away to Paris Saint-Germain has left their Champions League hopes hanging by a thread but the season is far from over, writes Robbie Savage

arts.ttl: Todd Boehly given £160m warning he can't ignore over Chelsea future
arts.sum: The impact of a lack of Champions League football is set to be felt by Chelsea when they publish their annual accounts for the 2023/24 season in the coming months. Having made the quarter finals of European football’s top tier knockout club competition back in 2022/23, the last financial year that was published, the Blues failed to qualify last season or this season, although they are in a better position during the current campaign to potentially land a top-four spot and bring an end to that run for the 2025/26 season.

arts.ttl: Chelsea considering Garnacho move - Friday's gossip
arts.sum: Chelsea consider move for Alejandro Garnacho, Manchester City chase Andrea Cambiaso, and Borussia Dortmund weigh up two Premier League left-backs.

arts.ttl: Explained: Napoli and Chelsea interested in Garnacho but does he want to move?
arts.sum: Sky Sports' Melissa Reddy discusses the ongoing interest from Chelsea and Napoli in Alejandro Garnacho and explains that the young winger initially had 'no intention of leaving Man United' in this transfer window.

arts.ttl: When Will Omar Marmoush Make His Manchester City Debut?
arts.sum: Omar Marmoush can debut for Manchester City as early as Jan. 25 when Chelsea visits the Etihad.

arts.ttl: Dream Chelsea attack after Garnacho transfer as Sancho call made and two leave
arts.sum: With that being said, it looks as though it is a deal Chelsea can get over the line, but it does bring into question who will consistently start in Maresca's favoured front four. Dream Chelsea attack after January : Madueke, Palmer, Garnacho, Jackson.

arts.ttl: Source: Utd eye Nkunku as Chelsea mull Garnacho
arts.sum: Manchester United have asked to be kept informed of developments regarding Christopher Nkunku's future, a source has told ESPN.

arts.ttl: Chris Sutton and Paul Merson disagree on score prediction for Chelsea’s 'huge game’ vs Manchester City
arts.sum: Chelsea take on Manchester City this weekend in what feels like a huge fixture in the top-four race. Chelsea travel to Man City on Saturday...

arts.ttl: 12 players could miss Man City vs Chelsea as major injury update given
arts.sum: Guardiola's team have all but conceded their Premier League crown with City a staggering 12 points behind league leaders Liverpool after 22 matches, having also played a game more than the Reds. Chelsea travel to a wounded Manchester City team on Saturday evening as they look to inflict more pain on Pep Guardiola's side.

arts.ttl: Palmer, Colwill, Fernandez, Lavia - Chelsea injury news and return dates
arts.sum: Below, football.london has the latest injury news from the club ahead of a busy and important few weeks. Chelsea return to action on Saturday evening (kick-off: 5:30pm) away at reigning Premier League champions Manchester City .
